info.name: Zoho Sprints - API Collection
info.description: Zoho Sprints API is REST based and it uses the Oauth 2.0 protocol for authentication. This document helps you to fetch and modify data in Sprints with our API. It uses HTTP response codes to indicate API errors. These APIs facilitate integration with other Zoho applications and third-party tools with ease. The responses are JSON based.

item.name: Workspaces

request.description: Fetch the list of all the workspaces in which you are associated.
Fetch the settings of a specific workspace.
Fetch the default and custom link types of a specific workspace.
Fetch all the custom tags in your workspace.
Fetch all the details of the log hours across projects.
Configure holidays for your workspace.
Define the link and back link names and create link types for your workspace.
Create custom tags and categorize a particular group of work items in your backlog or sprint.
Modify the link and back link names to update the custom link type.
Modify the tag name and color.
Delete the custom link type created in your workspace.
Delete the custom tag created in your workspace.

item.description: In Zoho Sprints, your business runs on an entity called a "Workspace". If you run multiple firms, you create multiple workspaces in Sprints and get them going.

item.name: Projects

request.description:
Fetch the list of projects that are associated with a specific workspace.

Note: The projects in which only you are associated will be listed.
Fetch all the project groups available in a workspace.
Fetch the project backlog of a specific project.
Fetch the details of a specific project.
Fetch the priorities of a specific project.
Create a new project.
Update a specific project.
Delete a specific project.

item.description: Any accomplishable piece of work can be termed as a project in Zoho Sprints. Every workspace can have a set of projects. Typically, a project is a subset of a workspace.

item.name: Sprints

request.description:
Fetch the list of all the sprints that are associated with a specific project.

Note: The sprints in which only you are associated will be listed. If you don't pass 'type' param, only the upcoming sprints would be listed.
Fetch the details of a specific sprint.
Fetch the comments of a specific sprint.
Add a new sprint in your project.
Comment on a specific sprint.
Update a specific sprint.
Modify a specific sprint comment
Start a specific sprint.

To complete a sprint using this API, all the items in it must be in either of the following states:

1) Updated to "Closed" status.

2) Moved to the backlog or another sprint.

To cancel a sprint using this API, all the items in it must be in either of the following states:

1) Updated to "Closed" status

2) Moved to the backlog or another sprint
Replan a specific sprint.
Delete a specific sprint.
Delete a specific sprint comment.

item.description: Break down a project into smaller units called "sprints". Typically, a sprint lasts for 2 - 4 weeks.

item.name: Items

request.description: Fetch the list of all the items associated with a sprint.
Fetch the details of a specific item.
Fetch the activities of a specific item.
Fetch the details of multiple items in a project.
Fetch the comments of a specific item.
Fetch the items linked with a specific item.
Fetch the timer details for items.
Fetch all the tags that are associated with the item.
Fetch all the users currently following the item.
Fetch the reminder set for an item.
Add an item to a specific sprint or the backlog.
Add sub item to a specific item in sprint or the backlog.
Add attachments to a specific item.
Comment on a specific item.
Set reminder for an item.
Clone a specific item.
Link work items with similar set of goals using the default or custom link types.
Update a specific item.
Modify an item comment.
Update the reminder set for an item.
Move one or more items across projects.

Modify the link type of the existing item linked to a different link type.

Note: If the main work item is linked with the direct link name and you update it with a new link type, the link type ID param that you pass will automatically update the linked item with its corresponding link name.
Associate the custom tag to an item or update the existing tags associated with an item.
Add new followers to an item or remove existing followers from an item.
Delete an item.
Delete attachment from an item.
Delete an item comment.
Delete an item reminder.
Delink the work items to remove the linking.

item.description: Create items within a sprint to bring more clarity to the kind of work that you are currently sprinting on.

item.name: Epic

request.description: Fetch the list of epics present inside a specific project.
Fetch the details of a particular epic
Fetch the list of all the sprints associated to a specific epic.
Fetch the list of all the work items associated to a specific epic.
Create an epic in a specific project.
Associate one or more work items with a specific epic in a specific project.
Modify an epic in a specific project.
Delete a specific epic in a specific project.

item.description: An epic is a large piece of work that comprises multiple user stories and sprints. When a huge product has to be shipped, it can be broken down into epics, and further down into sprints and work items. In Zoho Sprints, you can manage work items across relevant sprints by associating them to an epic and drive them to completion.

item.name: Timesheet

request.description: Fetch the list of time logs.
Add time logs for a specific item.
Add general log hour.
Update a specific time log.
Approve a specific time log.
Update billing status for log hour.
Delete a specific time log

item.description: With timesheet, you can measure the effort logged on every work item in your sprint. It helps in evaluating the team's productivity and performance.

item.name: Users

request.description: Fetch the list of all the users in a workspace.
Fetch the list of all the users in a project
Fetch the list of users in a sprint.
Add users to a specific workspace.
Add users to a specific project.
Add existing users to a specific sprint.
Update the role of a specific user in a workspace.
Delete a specific user in a workspace.
Delete a specific user in a project.
Delete a specific user in a sprint.

item.description: Users are the workforce of a project. You can create and manage users with the Zoho Sprints APIs.
